case_title: TIDEWATER FINANCE COMPANY DBA TIDEWATER CREDIT VS. MARTHA LOPEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MARTHA LOPEZ. GRANTED. NO APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE MONEY HELD BY THE SHERIFF IS TO BE RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: The matter is called twice. There being No appearances, the Court rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MARTHA LOPEZ.

Granted. No Appearance by the Judgment Creditor. The money held by the Sheriff is to be returned to the Judgment Debtor.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)
